chunks.title: Birth and Naming of Moses
chunks.reason: Describes the birth of Moses, his hiding in the ark, discovery by Pharaoh's daughter, and return to his mother.

chunks.title: Moses Flees Egypt
chunks.reason: Narrates Moses killing an Egyptian, his confrontation with a Hebrew, and his flight to Midian.

chunks.title: Moses in Midian
chunks.reason: Details Moses helping the daughters of Jethro, settling in Midian, and marrying Zipporah.

chunks.title: God Hears Israel's Cry
chunks.reason: Describes the death of the Egyptian king, the Israelites' groaning in slavery, and God remembering His covenant.
